name: modernization
description: Legacy workload modernization to AWS — 6R strategy (Rehost/Replatform/Refactor/Repurchase/Retire/Retain), workload assessment, to-be architecture (ECS/EKS/Serverless), containerization (multi-stage, multi-arch, non-root), and cutover planning (Blue-Green, Canary, Rolling). Adapted from aws-samples/sample-ai-driven-modernization-with-kiro (MIT-0).
